Fully Automated

Profit from automated trading strategies with a click. No coding required.

Roadmap
Mainnet

Launched grid trading and trend following vaults on Injective mainnet.

Market Making

Launched market making vaults to help projects list tokens on the Injective orderbook.

Hyper Staking

Powered by our LSD token blackINJ, this vault supercharges your INJ staking yield.

Staking BLACK

Token holders are able to stake BLACK to earn a share of our protocol revenue.

DEX Listing

Listing of BLACK on Helix and Dojoswap.

Arb Vaults

High frequency arbitrage trading bots help users profit from differing prices across DEXes.

CEX Listing

Listing of BLACK on top centralized exchanges.

Money Markets

Allow users to deposit collateral such as blackINJ to support leverage trading.

Frequently Asked Questions

+ What is Black Panther Finance?

Black Panther Finance is a decentralized asset management protocol designed to help users achieve superior returns on their digital assets through intelligent vaults. These vaults allow users to profit from trading opportunities with just a click of a button.


+ How is Black Panther different from other yield protocols?

Unlike typical yield protocols that focus solely on auto-compounding, Black Panther offers active trading strategies, such as grid trading, providing a new source of alpha for its users.


+ Is prior trading and DeFi experience required?

No, our platform caters to both experienced users and newcomers. The platform is fully automated, allowing users to profit from yield opportunities without any coding.


+ How secure is my investment with Black Panther?

Black Panther's smart contracts are audited and we offer a self-custody solution, meaning users have full control over their funds. They can deposit or withdraw from our vaults at any time.


+ How do I interact with the Black Panther platform?

Simply connect your MetaMask, Keplr or Leap wallet and deposit funds into the vault. The platform’s user-friendly interface displays real-time data, bot actions, performance statistics, and more.


+ Are profits guaranteed by using Black Panther’s service?

No. Crypto trading carries substantial risk and the possibility of both significant profits and losses. All trading strategies are used at user discretion and user own risk. Black Panther will not be liable to you for any loss that might arise from use of our services. Black Panther earns its income from the collected management fee. It is in our interest to provide a profitable service so that you may continuing using our services.
